titlestmt.titleproper: Farm Bureau scrapbooks, New York State21-24-461
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M. Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Farm Bureau scrapbooks, New York State
did.abstract: Scrapbooks documenting farm bureau activities county by county, 1912-1917; also two scrapbooks on farm bureau activity statewide, 1928-1934.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Between 1911 and 1918, Farm Bureaus were organized by Cornell's College of Agriculture in most rural counties in New York State, before 1914 with the assistance of Sears Roebuck, railroads, chambers of commerce, and other business groups, after 1914 with federal aid provided under the Smith-Lever Act. In 1918, these bureaus and those which had been organized simultaneously in other states organized nationally as the American Farm Bureau Federation. Within New York, the county farm bureaus were organized as the New York State Farm Bureau Federation. The integration of Cooperative Extension and the Farm Bureaus continued in New York State into the 1950s, when separation was mandated by the federal government.

emph.ref: Series XXVIII. Flood and Drought Relief
Series XXXVI. Farm and Home Bureau and 4-H Club Association

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Farm Bureau scrapbooks, New York State, #21-24-461. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Scrapbooks documenting farm bureau activities county by county, 1912-1917; also two scrapbooks on farm bureau activity statewide, 1928-1934 and photographs of various county agents and conferences.

controlaccess.subject: County agricultural agents.
Agriculture -- Societies, etc.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State Farm Bureau Federation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Lewis County Farm and Home Bureau News for July and September of 1926 and March of 1927
